title: FAQ 7 - Payroll Debt and Financing Ability
transcript_text: Question number seven, everybody. How does the payroll debt affect my ability to get financing or keep operating? Will the banks see CRA liens? Remember, the CRA doesn't do liens, they do writs. There's a big difference between the two. But the CRA will contact your bank directly with requirement to pay letters. And sometimes they'll do requirement for information letters. Now, the bank has to be careful on those. I'm actually suing a bank in BC for divulging information about my corporation to that Mark McDonald loser out in Surrey, BC. So the banks, they will give your information away, but they do have to be careful what they give away. So will the banks see your CRA writs? Yes, they will. Will clients or suppliers find out if there's a payroll debt problem? Eventually, if the CRA is not getting anywhere with you, they will call your clients if you were foolish enough to tell the CRA who your clients are. It's amazing how many of you out there have done this, where the CRA sends you a sheet of paper saying, you have to fill this out. Tell us who all your clients are. And you do. I don't understand why you would do that. I don't get it. I just, I really don't get it. Truthfully, I don't get it. I get a big black mark and put a big slash over it, a couple of F words on it, mail it in. Done. Now, there's a couple of times where I've picked up dog excrement with it and just mailed the smear. There you go. That's what I think of your paperwork. So what is it with everybody being so eager to fill out paper? Who's paying you to do the paperwork?

• Can I move my assets into a new company without CRA reversing the transaction?

Eventually, if the CRA is not getting anywhere with you, they will call your clients if you were foolish enough to tell the CRA who your clients are. It's amazing how many of you out there have done this, where the CRA sends you a sheet of paper saying, you have to fill this out. Tell us who all your clients are. And you do. I don't understand why you would do that. I don't get it. I just, I really don't get it. Truthfully, I don't get it.
